ucb-income-plus-fund.fee: Not stated; total expenses capped at 4% of NAV
ucb-income-plus-fund.exit: Up to 1% if redeemed within 100 days or over 25% of holding
ucb-income-plus-fund.min: 500 units individual / 5,000 units institution; SIP from BDT 5,000

ucb-aml-first-mutual-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)

ucb-taqwa-growth-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
ucb-taqwa-growth-fund.exit: Exit load if redeemed before 360 days (before 3 years for SIP); rate set by the AMC; no entry load
